headline: Ariel Appreciation Fund Q1 2026 Performers And Detractors
summary: Ariel Appreciation Fund traded up +1.14% in the quarter, lagging the Russell Midcap Value Index's +3.68% gain and the +1.29% return posted by the Russell Midcap Index. Read more here.
